Nomura Kyūkoku

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Tanabata Inrō
by Nomura Kyūkoku
Edo Japan · Nomura Kyūkoku · early 19th c.
A three-case lacquer inrō (small nested box) depicting the Weaver and the Herdboy — the two Tanabata star-lovers, separated by the Milky Way and reunited once a year.
←Kawanabe Kyōsai Johann Joachim Kändler→
